title: VhyperCraft
description: This modpack looks to recapture the vibe of 1.7.10 modded Minecraft, by using a handful of beloved mods from that version. This particular selection was used in a short-lived series on my YouTube channel.
body:
Welcome to VhyperCraft!
==================

Get a blast from the past with this adventuring oriented modpack! Relive the old days, and experience mods that you may haven't played in a long time! Explore dimensions, fight bosses, and become stronger!

Inspired by old content by creators on YouTube that covered these mods, VhyperCraft is a small collection of a mods put together by me and my friend, ItzHyperMate, for a short-lived YouTube series on my channel back in 2020. Now, three years later, I have reconstructed this mod pack and finally uploaded it publicly!

Now, to be honest, this was my first go at making a mod pack and I am still learning, so the mod selection may not be the most well thought out.

And please, don't mind the custom title screen. We tried our best.

Some mods had to be removed from the original selection used back in 2020, due to copyright reasons.

Mods Included:​
-------------------

*   AbyssalCraft- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/abyssalcraft
